description: VoiceIsolate Pro ONNX model registry — all models execute locally via onnxruntime-web (WebGPU → WASM fallback). NO cloud inference. Models are fetched once on first run and stored in the browser Cache API by model-loader.js.

models.purpose: Voice Activity Detection — gates the pipeline before heavy ML stages
RNNoise — lightweight broadband noise suppressor, always-on stage 1
models.notes: Public HuggingFace repo — no auth required. CORS-enabled for browser fetch.

models.purpose: Hybrid Demucs v4 — primary vocals / accompaniment source separation
models.notes: MrCitron repo contains official Demucs v4 HTDemucs exported to standalone ONNX. Fallback: timcsy/demucs-web-onnx which is purpose-built for ONNX Runtime Web / WebGPU browser inference.

models.purpose: Band-Split RNN — secondary vocals extractor used in Creator/Forensic mode
models.notes: IMPORTANT: crlandsc/bsrnn-vocals ships as PyTorch .pth — must be converted to ONNX via export_bsrnn_onnx.py before use. Until converted, model-loader.js should skip BSRNN and fall back to Demucs-only mode. Set status to verified_cdn only after uploading converted .onnx to Joker5514/models HF dataset.

delivery_notes: silero_vad.onnx is committed to the repo and served directly — no download needed.
rnnoise_suppressor.onnx (0.18 MB) — fetched on first boot from niobures/RNNoise HuggingFace repo. Public, CORS-enabled, no auth token required.

demucs_v4_quantized.onnx (83 MB) — fetched lazily on first audio upload from MrCitron/demucs-v4-onnx (official standalone ONNX export). Fallback: timcsy/demucs-web-onnx (built specifically for ONNX Runtime Web + WebGPU).

bsrnn_vocals.onnx — requires manual ONNX export from crlandsc/bsrnn-vocals PyTorch weights. Run scripts/export_bsrnn_onnx.py then upload to https://huggingface.co/datasets/Joker5514/models. Until available, model-loader.js degrades gracefully to Demucs-only separation.
After first run all models are served from Cache API (vip-models-v1) — zero network on repeat visits.
The service worker (sw.js) intercepts /app/models/*.onnx fetches and returns the cached binary to ml-worker.js.
To self-host: download each model, place in public/app/models/, and update cdn_src to relative path ./models/<filename>.

model_loader_behavior.download_ui: Show progress modal with per-model MB progress bar. Demucs download (83MB) must show estimated time. Do not block UI thread during fetch.
model_loader_behavior.integrity_check: sha256 field — leave empty to skip check, populate after upload to enable.
